ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol used for trading the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the stock operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock goes ex-dividend */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is payable */,
  "dividend_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the dividend paid */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in the dividend amount from the previous payment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the dividend */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend was declared */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the shareholders' list is recorded for dividend payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the price is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  "adjusted_price" TEXT /* Adjusted price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the analyst belongs */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the analyst is a team lead */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Dividend Analysis, Stock Performance) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the client machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date until which the notification is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock listing */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being listed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock was listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_listings_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_listings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast model (e.g., Linear Regression, ARIMA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
